relevant_files.summary: Defines AgentsMeta node schema, current L0/L1/L2 derivation, topology type derivation, stable id defaults, and string activation description.
Defines public AgentsMetaNode type consumed by CLI/server/dashboard.
Loads agents.meta.json, bootstrap README, human lock, matches nodes by activation/scope_glob, and reads rule MD content.
Batch path planning service with shared bundle view and description stub union.
Scans .fabric/agents/**/*.md and compiles node metadata from shadow-mirroring paths.
Init state machine writes bootstrap README, agents.meta.json, human-lock, forensic report, and client hooks/skills.
Documents current init flow and states that Stage 6 writes .fabric/agents/ rule nodes and updates agents.meta.json.
Documents current execution protocol: fab_get_rules / fab_plan_context load meta and distribute L0/L1/L2 rules.

patterns.description: Rule nodes are currently discovered from .fabric/agents/**/*.md and layer is derived from path depth.
Nodes with activation.tier=description return description stubs instead of full content.

patterns.pattern: L0 bootstrap separate from meta nodes
patterns.description: L0 content is read from .fabric/bootstrap/README.md and initial meta only contains L0.

constraints: Dashboard/server/CLI consume shared AgentsMeta schema, so schema changes are cross-package.
Current root .fabric/agents.meta.json is missing, so Fabric MCP could not provide project-local rules during this analysis.
Recent uncommitted changes exist outside this analysis: .fabric/audit.jsonl, .intent-ledger.jsonl, packages/cli/src/scanner/tree-sitter-probe.ts, and other workflow/team artifacts.

integration_points.description: MCP schema wrapper for expanded plan-context contract.
Dashboard mirrored type will need updates if plan-context output changes.
Registry mutation must validate new node schema and update revision semantics.

key_findings: Description schema is currently a plain string under activation.description.
L1/L2 derivation is currently path-depth-based and conflicts with the proposed Domain/Module model.
fab_plan_context already has the right place to host preflight descriptions, but needs ranking/profile support.
Init currently lacks INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md and a three-tier constitution prompt.
Structured MD injection requires a parser/API layer, not only documentation.

_metadata.exploration_scope: Fabric-v2 rule registry, init, plan-context, get-rules, sync-meta
